subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Thornburg-Cropper
subcodes.first_line: There are seasons in the revelation from God, as in the natural year, and just as the Christ manifested the Spirit of God in the flesh
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @Christ; Christianity, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
